name: Internship Programme Of The Department Of Expenditure
benefit_description: Remuneration Token Remuneration @ ₹ 10,000/- per month per intern, payable on satisfactory completion of their internships and on submission of their Report / Paper. ﻿ Certificate of Internship Certificates will be issued to the interns on satisfactory completion of their internship and on submissio
details: The Internship Programme of the Department of Expenditure aims to familiarize willing and eligible undergraduates pursuing five-year integrated courses and Graduates pursuing post-Graduation/ post-Graduates pursuing Research with the overall process of formulation of economic policies of the Government. The internship is neither a job nor any such assurance for a job in the Department of Expenditure. ﻿ Duration The duration of the internship will be from two to six months at different points in
eligibility_text: Indian national pursuing postgraduation Research Courses in Economics/Finance/Management and in the 4th and 5th year of 5-year integrated Course in Law/any other professional course from Universities/Institutions of National and International repute are eligible to apply for the internship provided - Students pursuing post-graduate courses should have obtained a first-class Graduate degree. application_url: Interested and eligible students are to send their applications, along with their CVs in the enclosed proforma to - Section Officer (Admn-l), Department of Expenditure, Room No.264-B, North Block, New
